tasks.subject: Task 1: Build HeroDemo.astro — static structure with server-computed values
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create the HUD panel component with correct, server-rendered chainage/elevation/slope numbers and no client JS yet.

**Files:**
- Create: src/components/HeroDemo.astro

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- npm run build succeeds with no errors.
- Panel shows header row, SVG with two polylines over a grid, dashed cursor line, marker circle, readout box.
- Readout shows: station 'ПК 121+75.00', Отметка проекта '132.22', Отметка сущ. '131.33', Рабочая отметка '-0.89', Уклон ‰ '12.7', До ПК '25.00 м'.

**Verify:** cd abr-move && npm run build -> exits 0, no diagnostics.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["abr-move/src/components/HeroDemo.astro"], "verifyCommand": "cd abr-move && npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["npm run build succeeds", "readout shows ПК 121+75.00 / 132.22 / 131.33 / -0.89 / 12.7 / 25.00 м"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Add motion — auto-drift, hover-follow, reduced-motion
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Animate the marker: idle auto-drift loop (~8s pass, eased, pauses at ends), mouse-follow on hover, prefers-reduced-motion disables auto-drift only.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/components/HeroDemo.astro (append script block)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Marker auto-drifts left-right-left over ~8s passes when motion allowed and idle.
- Hovering the SVG makes the marker follow mouse x, readout updates live.
- Leaving the SVG resumes auto-drift after ~300ms.
- prefers-reduced-motion: reduce disables auto-drift but hover-follow still works.

**Verify:** cd abr-move && npm run build -> exits 0. Manual check via npm run dev + devtools reduced-motion emulation.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["abr-move/src/components/HeroDemo.astro"], "verifyCommand": "cd abr-move && npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["auto-drift loops ~8s each way", "hover-follow tracks pointer x", "reduced-motion disables auto-drift, hover-follow still works"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Wire HeroDemo into Hero.astro, two-column layout
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Render HeroDemo inside Hero.astro as a two-column desktop layout; remove old full-width watermark/road-SVG; keep mobile (<lg) unchanged.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/components/Hero.astro (full replacement, see plan)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- lg+ shows two columns: copy left, HeroDemo right.
- Below lg, HeroDemo root has display:none (hidden lg:block), not just visually hidden.
- Giant watermark logo removed from page entirely.
- Road-SVG lines appear only behind HeroDemo column, opacity <= 0.04.
- npm run build succeeds.
- Visual check at 375px/1024px/1440px: text/CTAs/stats unchanged aside from new right column at desktop widths.

**Verify:** cd abr-move && npm run build -> exits 0. Manual visual diff via npm run dev at 375/1024/1440px.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["abr-move/src/components/Hero.astro"], "verifyCommand": "cd abr-move && npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["two-column layout at lg+", "HeroDemo hidden below lg via display:none", "watermark logo removed", "road svg opacity <= 0.04 behind HeroDemo only", "build succeeds"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
tasks.activeForm: Wiring HeroDemo into Hero.astro two-column layout
